name: Guotai Junan Allianz Fund Management Co Ltd - Shuangxi CSI All-Share Index Securities Companies Exch
summary: Guotai Junan Allianz Fund Management Co Ltd - Shuangxi CSI All-Share Index Securities Companies Exch is an exchange-traded fund. It likely tracks the performance of an index composed of securities companies in China, offering investors exposure to the financial services sector.
